title: Scientific Notation Calculator - Convert Numbers
description: Free scientific notation calculator. Convert numbers to and from scientific notation. Perform arithmetic operations with scientific notation.
keywords: scientific notation calculator, scientific notation converter, standard form calculator, exponent notation, powers of ten
intro: Convert numbers to scientific notation or convert scientific notation back to standard form. Enter any number to get started.

faq.a: Scientific notation expresses numbers as a coefficient (1-10) multiplied by a power of 10. For example, 5,000 = 5 × 10³.
It's used for very large or very small numbers in science, engineering, and mathematics to make them easier to read and calculate.

faq.q: How do I convert to scientific notation?
faq.a: Move the decimal point until you have a number between 1 and 10. Count the moves - that's your exponent. Right moves = positive, left = negative.
